allow: Bash(node -e "console.log\(''Local date \(en-CA\):'', new Date\(\).toLocaleDateString\(''en-CA''\)\); console.log\(''UTC ISO:'', new Date\(\).toISOString\(\).slice\(0, 10\)\);")

Bash(python -c "from datetime import datetime; print\(''datetime.now\(\):'', datetime.now\(\).strftime\(''%Y-%m-%d %H:%M''\)\); from zoneinfo import ZoneInfo; print\(''CT:'', datetime.now\(ZoneInfo\(''America/Chicago''\)\).strftime\(''%Y-%m-%d %H:%M''\)\)")
